Korea's demand for New Zealand deer velvet has weakened significantly, with imports down 18.3% year-on-year in the 12 months to April 2026, sitting at 153,674 kg. The market has drawn modest media attention, with 50 news articles published in the last 90 days — including recent pieces on health supplements and local heritage.
